main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int acds_main (void)
ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point.

Function Documentation

int acds_main (void )

ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point. Expects options already parsed and shared initialization complete. Called by main.c mode dispatcher after options_init() and asciichat_shared_init().

Returns

Exit code (0 = success, non-zero = error)

Definition at line 82 of file discovery-service/main.c.

82                     {
83   asciichat_error_t result;
84 
85   // Handle keepawake: check for mutual exclusivity and apply mode default
86   // Discovery-service default: keepawake DISABLED (use --keepawake to enable)
87   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake) && GET_OPTION(disable_keepawake)) {
88     log_error("--keepawake and --no-keepawake are mutually exclusive");
89     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
90   }
91   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake)) {
92     (void)platform_enable_keepawake();
93   }
94 
95   // Increase file descriptor limit for many concurrent connections
96 #ifdef __linux__
97   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 65536, .rlim_max = 65536};
98   if (setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl) < 0) {
99     log_warn("couldn't raise fd limit: %s", strerror(errno));
100   }
101 #elif defined(__APPLE__)
102   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 10240, .rlim_max = RLIM_INFINITY};
103   setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl);
104 #endif
105 
106   // Options already parsed and shared initialization complete (done by main.c)
107   const options_t *opts = options_get();
108 
109   log_info("ascii-chat Discovery Service (acds) starting...");
110   log_info("Version: %s (%s, %s)", ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE);
111 
112   // Initialize session string generator (libsodium)
113   result = acds_string_init();
114   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
115     log_error("Failed to initialize session string generator");
116     return result;
117   }
118 
119   // Load or generate identity keys
120   uint8_t public_key[32];
121   uint8_t secret_key[64];
122 
123   const char *acds_key_path = GET_OPTION(encrypt_key);
124   // If no key provided, use default path in config directory
125   char default_key_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH] = {0};
126   if (!acds_key_path || acds_key_path[0] == '\0') {
127     const char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
128     if (config_dir) {
129       safe_snprintf(default_key_path, sizeof(default_key_path), "%sdiscovery_identity", config_dir);
130       acds_key_path = default_key_path;
131     }
132   }
133   log_info("Loading identity key from %s", acds_key_path);
134   result = acds_identity_load(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
135 
136   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
137     log_info("Identity key not found, generating new key...");
138 
139     result = acds_identity_generate(public_key, secret_key);
140     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
141       log_error("Failed to generate identity key");
142       return result;
143     }
144 
145     result = acds_identity_save(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
146     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
147       log_error("Failed to save identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
148       return result;
149     }
150 
151     log_info("Saved new identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
152   }
153 
154   // Display server fingerprint
155   char fingerprint[65];
156   acds_identity_fingerprint(public_key, fingerprint);
157   log_info("Discovery server identity: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
158   char msg[256];
159   safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🔑 Server fingerprint: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
160   log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
161 
162   // Create config from options for server initialization
163   acds_config_t config;
164   // Read validated port option (discovery-service listens on 'port', not 'acds_port')
165   int port_num = GET_OPTION(port);
166   if (port_num < 1 || port_num > 65535) {
167     log_error("Invalid port: %d (must be 1-65535)", port_num);
168     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
169   }
170   config.port = port_num;
171 
172   const char *address = opts && opts->address[0] != '\0' ? opts->address : "127.0.0.1";
173   const char *address6 = opts && opts->address6[0] != '\0' ? opts->address6 : "::1";
174   const char *log_file = opts && opts->log_file[0] != '\0' ? opts->log_file : "acds.log";
175   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address, address, sizeof(config.address));
176   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address6, address6, sizeof(config.address6));
177   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.database_path, GET_OPTION(discovery_database_path), sizeof(config.database_path));
178   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.key_path, acds_key_path, sizeof(config.key_path));
179   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.log_file, log_file, sizeof(config.log_file));
180   config.log_level = GET_OPTION(log_level);
181   config.require_server_identity = GET_OPTION(require_server_identity) != 0;
182   config.require_client_identity = GET_OPTION(require_client_identity) != 0;
183 
184   // Log security policy
185   if (config.require_server_identity) {
186     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from servers creating sessions");
187   }
188   if (config.require_client_identity) {
189     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from clients joining sessions");
190   }
191 
192   // Parse STUN servers from comma-separated list
193   config.stun_count = 0;
194   memset(config.stun_servers, 0, sizeof(config.stun_servers));
195   const char *stun_servers_str = GET_OPTION(stun_servers);
196   if (stun_servers_str && stun_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
197     char stun_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
198     SAFE_STRNCPY(stun_copy, stun_servers_str, sizeof(stun_copy));
199 
200     char *saveptr = NULL;
201     char *token = platform_strtok_r(stun_copy, ",", &saveptr);
202     while (token && config.stun_count < 4) {
203       // Trim whitespace
204       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
205         token++;
206       size_t len = strlen(token);
207       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
208         token[--len] = '\0';
209       }
210 
211       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.stun_servers[0].host)) {
212         config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host_len = (uint8_t)len;
213         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host, token,
214                      sizeof(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host));
215         log_info("Added STUN server: %s", token);
216         config.stun_count++;
217       } else if (len > 0) {
218         log_warn("STUN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
219       }
220 
221       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
222     }
223   }
224 
225   // Parse TURN servers from comma-separated list
226   config.turn_count = 0;
227   memset(config.turn_servers, 0, sizeof(config.turn_servers));
228   const char *turn_servers_str = GET_OPTION(turn_servers);
229   const char *turn_username_str = GET_OPTION(turn_username);
230   const char *turn_credential_str = GET_OPTION(turn_credential);
231 
232   if (turn_servers_str && turn_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
233     char turn_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
234     SAFE_STRNCPY(turn_copy, turn_servers_str, sizeof(turn_copy));
235 
236     char *saveptr = NULL;
237     char *token = platform_strtok_r(turn_copy, ",", &saveptr);
238     while (token && config.turn_count < 4) {
239       // Trim whitespace
240       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
241         token++;
242       size_t len = strlen(token);
243       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
244         token[--len] = '\0';
245       }
246 
247       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].url)) {
248         config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url_len = (uint8_t)len;
249         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url, token,
250                      sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url));
251 
252         // Set username if provided
253         if (turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] != '\0') {
254           size_t username_len = strlen(turn_username_str);
255           if (username_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].username)) {
256             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username_len = (uint8_t)username_len;
257             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username, turn_username_str,
258                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username));
259           }
260         }
261 
262         // Set credential if provided
263         if (turn_credential_str && turn_credential_str[0] != '\0') {
264           size_t credential_len = strlen(turn_credential_str);
265           if (credential_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].credential)) {
266             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential_len = (uint8_t)credential_len;
267             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential, turn_credential_str,
268                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential));
269           }
270         }
271 
272         log_info("Added TURN server: %s (username: %s)", token,
273                  turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] ? turn_username_str : "<none>");
274         config.turn_count++;
275       } else if (len > 0) {
276         log_warn("TURN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
277       }
278 
279       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
280     }
281   }
282 
283   // Copy TURN secret for dynamic credential generation
284   const char *turn_secret_str = GET_OPTION(turn_secret);
285   if (turn_secret_str && turn_secret_str[0] != '\0') {
286     SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_secret, turn_secret_str, sizeof(config.turn_secret));
287     log_info("TURN dynamic credential generation enabled");
288   } else {
289     config.turn_secret[0] = '\0';
290   }
291 
292   // Initialize server
293   acds_server_t server;
294   memset(&server, 0, sizeof(server));
295   g_server = &server;
296 
297   result = acds_server_init(&server, &config);
298   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
299     log_error("Server initialization failed");
300     g_server = NULL;
301     return result;
302   }
303 
304   // Initialize WebSocket server (for browser clients)
305   websocket_server_config_t ws_config = {
306       .port = GET_OPTION(websocket_port),
307       .client_handler = acds_websocket_client_handler,
308       .user_data = &server,
309       .tls_cert_path = GET_OPTION(websocket_tls_cert),
310       .tls_key_path = GET_OPTION(websocket_tls_key),
311   };
312 
313   memset(&g_websocket_server, 0, sizeof(g_websocket_server));
314   asciichat_error_t ws_init_result = websocket_server_init(&g_websocket_server, &ws_config);
315   if (ws_init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
316     log_warn("Failed to initialize WebSocket server - browser clients will not be supported");
317   } else {
318     log_info("WebSocket server initialized on port %d", GET_OPTION(websocket_port));
319     // Start WebSocket event loop in background thread (services lws callbacks)
320     if (asciichat_thread_create(&g_ws_thread, "websocket_event_loop", websocket_server_thread_wrapper,
321                                 &g_websocket_server) == 0) {
322       g_ws_thread_started = true;
323       log_info("WebSocket event loop thread started");
324     } else {
325       log_error("Failed to start WebSocket event loop thread");
326     }
327   }
328 
329   // Initialize status tracking variables
330   g_discovery_start_time = time(NULL);
331   g_last_status_update = g_discovery_start_time;
332 
333   // Check if shutdown was requested during initialization
334   if (acds_should_exit()) {
335     log_info("Shutdown signal received during initialization, skipping server startup");
336     return 0;
337   }
338 
339   // =========================================================================
340   // UPnP Port Mapping (Quick Win for Direct TCP)
341   // =========================================================================
342   // Try to open port via UPnP so direct TCP works for ~70% of home users.
343   // If this fails, clients fall back to WebRTC automatically - not fatal.
344   //
345   // Strategy:
346   //   1. UPnP (works on ~90% of home routers)
347   //   2. NAT-PMP fallback (Apple routers)
348   //   3. If both fail: use ACDS + WebRTC (reliable, but slightly higher latency)
349 
350   // Check again before expensive UPnP initialization (might timeout trying to reach router)
351   if (acds_should_exit()) {
352     log_info("Shutdown signal received before UPnP initialization");
353     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
354     goto cleanup_resources;
355   }
356 
357   if (GET_OPTION(enable_upnp)) {
358     asciichat_error_t upnp_result = nat_upnp_open(config.port, "ascii-chat ACDS", &g_upnp_ctx);
359 
360     if (upnp_result == ASCIICHAT_OK && g_upnp_ctx) {
361       char public_addr[22];
362       if (nat_upnp_get_address(g_upnp_ctx, public_addr, sizeof(public_addr)) == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
363         char msg[256];
364         safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🌐 Public endpoint: %s (direct TCP)", public_addr);
365         log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
366         log_info("UPnP: Port mapping successful, public endpoint: %s", public_addr);
367       }
368     } else {
369       log_info("UPnP: Port mapping unavailable or failed - will use WebRTC fallback");
370       log_console(LOG_INFO, "📡 Clients behind strict NATs will use WebRTC fallback");
371     }
372   } else {
373     log_debug("UPnP: Disabled (use --upnp to enable automatic port mapping)");
374   }
375 
376   // Check if shutdown was requested before initializing mDNS
377   if (acds_should_exit()) {
378     log_info("Shutdown signal received before mDNS initialization");
379     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
380     goto cleanup_resources;
381   }
382 
383   // Initialize mDNS for LAN discovery of ACDS server
384   // This allows clients on the local network to discover the discovery service itself
385 
386   log_debug("Initializing mDNS for ACDS LAN service discovery...");
387   g_mdns_ctx = asciichat_mdns_init();
388   if (!g_mdns_ctx) {
389     LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to initialize mDNS (non-fatal, LAN discovery disabled)");
390     log_warn("mDNS disabled for ACDS - LAN discovery of discovery service will not be available");
391   } else {
392     // Advertise ACDS service on the LAN
393     // Build hostname if available
394     char hostname[256] = {0};
395     gethostname(hostname, sizeof(hostname) - 1);
396 
397     asciichat_mdns_service_t service = {
398         .name = "ascii-chat-Discovery-Service",
399         .type = "_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp",
400         .host = hostname,
401         .port = config.port,
402         .txt_records = NULL,
403         .txt_count = 0,
404     };
405 
406     asciichat_error_t mdns_advertise_result = asciichat_mdns_advertise(g_mdns_ctx, &service);
407     if (mdns_advertise_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
408       LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to advertise ACDS mDNS service");
409       log_warn("mDNS advertising failed for ACDS - LAN discovery disabled");
410       asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
411       g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
412     } else {
413       log_console(LOG_INFO, "🌐 mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' on LAN");
414       log_info("mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' (port=%d)", config.port);
415     }
416   }
417 
418   // Install signal handlers for clean shutdown
419   signal(SIGINT, acds_handle_signal);
420   signal(SIGTERM, acds_handle_signal);
421 
422 
423   // Run server
424   result = acds_server_run(&server);
425   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
426     log_error("Server run failed");
427   }
428 
429 cleanup_resources:
430   // Cleanup
431   // Disable keepawake before exit
432   platform_disable_keepawake();
433 
434   log_info("Shutting down discovery server...");
435   acds_server_shutdown(&server);
436   g_server = NULL;
437 
438   // Stop and join WebSocket event loop thread
439   if (g_ws_thread_started) {
440     atomic_store_bool(&g_websocket_server.running, false);
441     asciichat_thread_join(&g_ws_thread, NULL);
442     g_ws_thread_started = false;
443   }
444   websocket_server_destroy(&g_websocket_server);
445   log_debug("WebSocket server destroyed");
446 
447   // Clean up UPnP port mapping
448   if (g_upnp_ctx) {
449     nat_upnp_close(&g_upnp_ctx);
450     log_debug("UPnP port mapping closed");
451   }
452 
453   // Clean up mDNS context
454   if (g_mdns_ctx) {
455     asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
456     g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
457     log_debug("mDNS context shut down");
458   }
459 
460   log_info("Discovery server stopped");
461   return result;
462 }




References acds_identity_fingerprint(),
    acds_identity_generate(), acds_identity_load(),
    acds_identity_save(), acds_server_init(),
    acds_server_run(), acds_server_shutdown(),
    acds_string_init(), acds_websocket_client_handler(),
    acds_config_t::address, options_state::address,
    acds_config_t::address6, options_state::address6,
    ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE,
    ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, asciichat_mdns_advertise(),
    asciichat_mdns_destroy(), asciichat_mdns_init(),
    ASCIICHAT_OK, asciichat_thread_create(),
    asciichat_thread_join(), atomic_store_bool(),
    acds_config_t::database_path, errno,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, get_config_dir(), GET_OPTION,
    acds_config_t::key_path, log_console, log_debug,
    LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET, log_error, acds_config_t::log_file,
    log_file, options_state::log_file, LOG_INFO,
    log_info, acds_config_t::log_level, log_warn,
    nat_upnp_close(), nat_upnp_get_address(),
    nat_upnp_open(), OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE, options_get(),
    platform_disable_keepawake(), platform_enable_keepawake(),
    PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH, platform_strtok_r(),
    acds_config_t::port, acds_config_t::require_client_identity,
    acds_config_t::require_server_identity, safe_snprintf(),
    SAFE_STRNCPY, acds_config_t::stun_count,
    acds_config_t::stun_servers, acds_config_t::turn_count,
    acds_config_t::turn_secret, acds_config_t::turn_servers,
    websocket_server_destroy(), and websocket_server_init().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.19
    ascii-chat
